title: Canopy Growth Analyst Ratings and Price Targets
text: Canopy Growth has received mixed analyst attention with a Moderate Buy consensus rating. The latest analyst rating from Benchmark upgraded their hold rating. Analysts' assessments highlight concerns and opportunities in the cannabis sector. Canopy Growth has 22.72% upside potential based on analysts' average price target. On the revenue side, next quarter's sales forecast for CGC is $54.64M with a range of $52.19M to $57.82M.
